metadata.description: Grid mapping of bank items in the game 'Realities', sorted by skill progression. Items themed around ancient consciousness technology, cataclysm remnants, hidden orders, and awakened life-force. Mapped row-by-row (top to bottom), column-by-column (left to right). Slight ethereal purple/blue auras, runes, and God’s-blood accents applied to all icons.
metadata.game_context: OSRS-style bank interface for gathering, production, and consciousness skills in a world of veiled knowledge and awakening power.
